new_claims.claim_text: WhatsApp reads user messages and shares them with third parties.
new_claims.notes: Claim from Telegram CEO about a competitor. Requires independent verification.

new_claims.claim_text: USPS suspends contributions to employee pensions after warning of 'cash crisis'.
80% of white-collar workers are refusing to adopt AI, finding manual workarounds.
new_claims.notes: Claim about widespread resistance to new technology adoption in the workforce.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump administration plans to dismantle the US Forest Service.
new_claims.notes: Claim about a significant policy change impacting a government agency.

new_claims.claim_text: Eligible males aged 18-25 will be automatically registered for the US military draft starting December 2026.
new_claims.notes: Claim about a major national policy with significant personal impact.

new_claims.claim_text: Abu Dhabi has a hidden stake in a major venture capital firm.
new_claims.notes: Claim about opaque financial influence and potential conflicts of interest.

new_claims.claim_text: A warehouse fire in Ontario, California, was allegedly started by an employee upset about their pay.
new_claims.notes: Claim about an act of defiance linked to labor disputes.

new_claims.claim_text: Social media bot farms are being used to manipulate online discourse.
new_claims.notes: Direct visual evidence of bot farm infrastructure.
